description: Agent given Synthea CSV export (patients.csv + observations.csv) should pick the synthea adapter, and correctly cross the WHO->CDC reference boundary mid-record for a patient whose visits span birth to age 3.
prompt: You have access to the growth-percentile-skill repository at the current working directory. Read SKILL.md and follow it. Synthea CSV exports are at tests/fixtures/synthea_patients.csv and tests/fixtures/synthea_observations.csv (one patient). Compute growth percentiles for every visit and summarize. At the end of your response, include the complete raw JSON array that scripts/growth.py produced, in a fenced ```json code block, unmodified. This is a non-interactive, single-turn evaluation: there is no user to reply further, so give your best complete final response now (if information is genuinely missing, say so clearly in this same response rather than pausing).
